title: Shrimp and Saffron Paella
description: A classic Spanish paella dish packed with succulent shrimp and infused with the warmth of saffron. Serve with a side of garlic bread for a complete meal.

ingredients.name: saffron threads
ingredients.notes: high-quality saffron is essential for this dish

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and red bell pepper and cook until tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, saffron threads, and shrimp. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the paella rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the vegetables.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
